AboutPage.metaDescription: Learn about Ahmad Hidayatullah - Full Stack Developer & Product Builder, development philosophy, and AI-assisted workflow.
AboutPage.label: Profile
AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.intro: I'm Ahmad Hidayatullah, an Information Systems student and self-taught Full Stack Developer focused on building real web products with modern technologies.
AboutPage.backgroundText: I started building web applications because I wanted to solve real problems, not just learn syntax. Early on I realized that building full products - handling both the technical and the product side - was where I thrived. I've since developed a practical workflow combining solid fundamentals with AI-assisted development to deliver faster without sacrificing quality.
AboutPage.philosophyText: I believe the best code is code that solves the stated problem clearly and maintainably. I avoid over-engineering and premature abstractions. Every line I write should trace directly to a user need.
AboutPage.principle1Desc: The simplest solution that works is almost always the right one.
AboutPage.principle2Desc: Every technical decision should serve user and business goals.
AboutPage.principle3Desc: Staying current through building, not just reading.
AboutPage.aiWorkflowText: I use AI tools as a force multiplier across every phase of development - while retaining full ownership of architecture, design decisions, and product direction.
AboutPage.workflowStep1: AI-assisted research to quickly understand problem space and existing solutions.
AboutPage.workflowStep2: Structured planning with AI-generated task breakdowns and architecture reviews.
AboutPage.workflowStep3: Development accelerated by AI pair programming - while I own every line that ships.
AboutPage.workflowStep4: Automated and manual testing with AI-assisted debugging.
AboutPage.goalsText: I'm looking to join a team where I can contribute as a Full Stack Developer, work on products with real impact, and continue growing my technical and product skills in a collaborative environment. Open to remote, hybrid, and on-site opportunities.

ContactPage.metaDescription: Get in touch with Ahmad Hidayatullah - Full Stack Developer & Product Builder.
ContactPage.label: Contact
ContactPage.title: Get In Touch
ContactPage.subtitle: I'm open to full-time positions, freelance projects, and collaboration opportunities. The best way to reach me is via email.
ContactPage.emailDesc: Preferred contact method. I aim to respond within 24-48 hours.
ContactPage.githubDesc: Browse my open source work and project repositories.
ContactPage.note: I'm currently open to new opportunities. If you have a project in mind or just want to connect, don't hesitate to reach out.
